Clarity.justification: The generated diagram is not visually clear or understandable. It appears to be a text-based representation with syntax errors, lacking any graphical elements, symbols, or layout that would make it accessible to stakeholders.

Completeness.justification: The generated diagram is missing all the components and connections present in the ground truth. It only contains partial text and syntax errors, with no representation of the architecture elements.

Consistency.justification: There is no consistency between the generated diagram and the ground truth. The generated diagram lacks the structural and semantic elements present in the ground truth, such as icons, labels, and connectors.
